news.t: What the Top 10 Active ETFs YTD Can Tell Us
AVANTIS REACHES THREE-YEAR ANNIVERSARY, CONTINUES TO EXPAND OFFERING

holdings.infoBox: AVDE is an equity ETF with a total of 3304 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 1.57%, Roche Holding AG at 0.90%, HSBC Holdings PLC ADR at 0.83%, Shell at 0.78%, and BHP Group at 0.58%.

overview.description: The Avantis International Equity ETF (AVDE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of non-US companies from developed markets, of all market capitalizations, focusing on smaller, value companies. AVDE was launched on Sep 24, 2019 and is issued by American Century Investments.
